ValidationRule.description: Ensures all pre-SIT formalities are complete before moving to Completed - SIT Ready
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Completed - SIT Ready"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), All_Formalities_Complete__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: All Pre-SIT formalities must be completed before moving to "Completed - SIT Ready". Please ensure: Unit Test Sheet, Manual Deployment Steps, Business Dependency, AC Update, and Peer Review are all complete.
